creator: markus@stoffdv.at
text:
Here is how other operating systems deal with this topic:

- OpenBSD: https://www.openbsd.org/faq/faq4.html#Download
- ArchLinux: https://archlinux.org/download/
- Debian: https://www.debian.org/CD/verify (via https://cdimage.debian.org/debian-cd/current/amd64/iso-cd/)

As far as I can tell it is industry standard to provide a documentation on how to verify the deliverables right on the download and/or release pages.
